hypothesis: There is no meaningful difference between the political parties.

per_entry.text: Both the Democrats and the Republicans are vested in this machine and are funded by billionaires.
per_entry.notes: FE-spirit. Lexical: «Both X and Y are vested» — pattern requires «both (sides|parties|teams|camps) (are )? (equally|just as) (bad|good|wrong|guilty)». Detector likely MISS — names parties instead of using abstract «sides/parties».

per_entry.text: The odd that the political establishment will initiate the move to replace neo-liberalism or even overhaul it are virtually non-existent.
per_entry.notes: FE-spirit (political-establishment leveling). No detector marker. Likely MISS.

per_entry.text: Apparently, both parties are dominated by war pigs.
per_entry.notes: FE-spirit. Lexical: «both parties are dominated by» — pattern requires «equally|just as» + «bad|good|wrong|guilty». Detector likely MISS.

per_entry.text: elected officials who purport to oppose domestic warrantless spying when the other party is in the White House typically change their minds once their party is in power.
per_entry.notes: FE-spirit (uniparty behavioral pattern across parties). No detector marker. Likely MISS.

per_entry.text: as Trump, Mike Johnson, Nancy Pelosi, and so many others have proven, their steadfast opposition magically transforms into vehement support once they ascend to power.
per_entry.notes: FE-spirit (cross-party behavioral collapse). No detector marker. Likely MISS.

per_entry.text: Trump on Monday demanded that FISA be fully renewed: yet again, with no reforms, safeguards, or limits of any kind.
per_entry.notes: FE-spirit (per article framing of Trump joining Obama+Biden in identical demand). Sentence alone is single-actor critique without explicit leveling words. Likely MISS.

per_entry.text: The Dissident Right rejects mutual forbearance in favor of a 'will-to-power' political approach and cannot save America's culture by sacrificing its creed.
per_entry.notes: Substantive ideological critique without leveling rhetoric.

per_entry.text: Contra AOC, there are makers and moochers on every rung of the income ladder.
per_entry.notes: Distinction-making argument across income classes. Should NOT fire.

per_entry.text: Wall Street firms see new customers. Progressives see expanded government involvement in retirement. Some conservatives see a backdoor route to Social Security privatization.
per_entry.notes: Multi-perspective enumeration — three distinct stakeholder views, NOT leveling. FP stress-test.

per_entry.text: The relationship has stabilized since the two leaders met last November, but it remains fragile—defined more by an absence of friction than any affirmative agenda.
per_entry.notes: Substantive analytical observation about US-China dynamics.

per_entry.text: Both leaders will likely announce Chinese purchases of American products, such as Boeing airplanes and agricultural goods.
per_entry.notes: «Both leaders will likely announce» — pattern requires (sides|parties|teams|camps), not «leaders». Should NOT fire — confirms pattern is correctly narrow.

per_entry.text: A weak Democratic Party opened the gates for the Republican Party in 2024, and they haven't made inroads since.
Ambition must be made to counteract ambition.
per_entry.notes: Federalist No. 51, public domain. Substantive comparison principle. Should NOT fire.

per_entry.text: The remedy for this inconveniency is to divide the legislature into different branches.
Лица, пытающиеся захватить российские активы, являются ворами и жуликами.
per_entry.notes: Substantive characterization, не leveling. Не должно fire.

per_entry.text: Страны ЕС не хотят становиться соучастниками этого воровства.
Уровень отношений между странами БРИКС системно растет.
per_entry.notes: Substantive analytical comparison BRICS vs West.

per_entry.text: Фактическое поражение в самими же начатой войне продемонстрировало глубину раскола между различными частями некогда единого западного мира.
per_entry.notes: Distinction-making (разные части западного мира). Не должно fire.
